description:
A music player that respects what's yours.

Noctis is a desktop music player for your local library — fast browsing,
synced lyrics, metadata editing, EQ, and more.
What's Changed
- Fixed playback stuttering when restarting tracks from the beginning
- Fixed volume slider static and crackling during adjustment
- Fixed startup issues caused by missing precompiled XAML resources
- Added "Noctis" application name to the Windows Volume Mixer
- Added optional diagnostic logging for LibVLC troubleshooting
- Added configurable audio output testing through environment variables
- Added support for custom LibVLC launch arguments for diagnostics
- Fixed outdated project documentation references
- Fixed Bluetooth audio stuttering and frame skipping during playback
- Improved Bluetooth playback stability with increased audio buffering
- Added configurable audio caching override for testing and troubleshooting
- Added startup diagnostics showing active VLC configuration and settings
Full Changelog: v1.1.14...v1.1.15
